orders.title: Orders
orders.noKeyWarning: No API key registered for {exchange}. Register one in Accounts first.
orders.realModeConfirmDesc: You are about to place a REAL order using your actual exchange funds. This action cannot be undone. Please confirm you want to proceed with live trading.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.noData: No portfolio data. Register exchange keys in Accounts first.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.noKeys: No exchange keys registered yet. Add one above to view your balances.

strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.name: Name
strategies.signalTooltip: Sends alerts when a signal fires. Orders must be placed manually.
strategies.autoTooltip: Automatically places orders when a signal fires.
strategies.paperTooltip: Tests your strategy with virtual funds. No real trades are placed.
strategies.realTooltip: Executes real orders against your exchange account with actual funds.
strategies.noStrategies: No strategies yet. Create one to get started.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.telegramStep1: 1. Search for the bot on Telegram and send /start
notifications.telegramStep2: 2. Enter the Chat ID provided by the bot below

flows.title: Flows
flows.emptyDesc: Drag & drop strategy nodes to build your own trading flow.
flows.mobileReadOnly: Flow editing is only available on desktop.
flows.backtestStartedDesc: Backtest requested. You will be notified when complete.
flows.backtestCompleteDesc: Check the results. You can scrub the timeline.

onboarding.step1Desc: Coin is a crypto auto-trading platform. Start safely with Paper Trading before committing real funds.
onboarding.step1b1: Test strategies risk-free with Paper Trading
onboarding.step2Desc: Register exchange API keys to view real balances and execute live trades. Paper Trading works without API keys.
onboarding.step2b1: Go to Accounts to register exchange API keys
onboarding.step2b2: Supports major exchanges: Upbit, Binance, and more
onboarding.step2b3: Keys are encrypted and stored securely
onboarding.step3Desc: In the Strategies page, create algorithm strategies like RSI or MACD in paper trading mode.
onboarding.step3b2: Set mode to 'Paper' to start safely
onboarding.step3b3: Configure stop-loss and max position risk settings
onboarding.step4Desc: The Markets page shows live prices and lets you analyze charts for any trading pair.
onboarding.step4b2: Click a symbol to open a detailed candle chart
onboarding.step4b3: Search symbols to quickly find the coin you want
onboarding.step5Desc: Always start with Paper Trading. Switch to live trading only after validating your strategy is stable.
onboarding.step5b1: Paper Trading: validate strategies with virtual funds
onboarding.step5b2: Live Trading: connected to your real exchange account
onboarding.step5b3: Creating a live strategy requires an extra confirmation
